nasb.text: The arrogant one will stumble and fall With no one to raise him up; And I will set fire to his cities And it will devour all his environs.”

esv.text: The proud one shall stumble and fall, with none to raise him up, and I will kindle a fire in his cities, and it will devour all that is around him.

cnv.text: 那傲慢的必絆跌仆倒， 沒有人扶他起來； 我必在他的城鎮中放火， 吞滅他四圍的一切。”

ccb.text: 狂傲的人要踉踉跄跄， 跌倒在地，无人扶起。 我要焚烧她的城邑， 使她周围的一切化为灰烬。’”
